outputs.main.sas:
# Load required packages
library(Tplyr)
library(pharmaRTF)
library(dplyr)
library(stringr)

# Read ADSL dataset
adsl <- read_xpt("adsl.xpt") %>% 
  mutate(TRT01A = factor(TRT01A, levels = c("Placebo", "Xanomeline Low", "Xanomeline High")))

# Filter to All Screened population
adsl_screened <- adsl %>% 
  filter(SCRFL == "Y")

# Build Tplyr table for Screening Summary
t <- tplyr_table(adsl_screened, TRT01A) %>%
  # Overall header
  add_layer(
    group_count(TRT01A, 
                where = TRUE,
                denom = "n",
                denom_where = TRUE,
                result_name = "screened")
  ) %>%
  # Screen failures
  add_layer(
    group_count(SCRREAS, 
                where = SCRFL == "Y" & SCSFL == "Y",
                denom = "n",
                denom_where = SCRFL == "Y",
                result_name = "screen_failures")
  ) %>%
  # Enrolled (Randomized)
  add_layer(
    group_count(RANDFL, 
                where = RANDFL == "Y",
                denom = "n",
                denom_where = SCRFL == "Y",
                result_name = "enrolled")
  )

# Build the table
screening_table <- build(t) %>%
  # Format the table
  mutate(
    row_label1 = case_when(
      var == "screened" ~ "Screened",
      var == "screen_failures" ~ "Screen Failures",
      var == "enrolled" ~ "Enrolled (Randomized)",
      TRUE ~ as.character(SCRREAS)
    ),
    row_label2 = if_else(var == "screen_failures" & !is.na(SCRREAS), 
                         str_wrap(SCRREAS, width = 40), NA_character_)
  ) %>%
  select(row_label1, row_label2, Placebo, `Xanomeline Low`, `Xanomeline High`) %>%
  # Add total column
  mutate(Total = rowSums(across(c(Placebo, `Xanomeline Low`, `Xanomeline High`)), na.rm = TRUE))

# Create RTF document
rtf <- read_rtf_template("template.rtf") %>%
  add_content(screening_table) %>%
  header_titles("14-1.01", "Screening Summary") %>%
  footer_provenance() %>%
  write_rtf("t1_3_tlf_screen_gen_046.rtf")

# Print confirmation message
cat("RTF table 't1_3_tlf_screen_gen_046.rtf' has been generated successfully.\n")
